name: SVG Web Downloader & Extractor
description: Extract and download SVG images from any website. Save vector graphics, icons, and logos in high quality SVG format.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' blob: data:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; connect-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
